'''Players'''
Add yourself and your friends to the list. Sort the nicks by alphabetical order.

'''Important'''
When you link to a persons article, if he is registered here, make sure you add the '''user article''' that looks something like: User:<Insert username here>.

== # ==
* $ome
* 2kni3

== A ==
* Adam
* Aegir
* Aerius
* Agn
* Ahmed
* Aki
* Alma
* [[User AnubisBlessing|AnubisBlessing]]
* [[User Asrack|Asrack]]
* Atumbra

== B ==
* BakTer
* Battant
* Beast
* Beat
* Beaver
* Benn0
* [[Blackninja]]
* Blister (aka Rakkula)
* Bolt

== C ==
* Caged
* Caldeth
* [[User Calvi|Calvi]]
* Chase
* Cizin
* Cloud
* Code
* Corpse
* Cra2y
* Crave
* [[User Crizze|Crizze]]
* Crusader
* Cumiques

== D ==
* da_nick
* DarkCharlie
* Data
* [[User Pwyll|Desmond]]
* DeYa
* Drama
* DreaM
* druFF
* Duality
* Dragoon

== E ==
* Eddan
* eDDie
* Erwan
* EST
* Evasion
* Exigo
* ExiT

== F ==
* Fenrir
* Filmonss
* Flame
* Flare
* Flawed
* Flesk
* Freak
* FreY
* Fu
* Funkkarimies

== G ==
* Gaston
* Gigolo
* Gigus
* Gizmo
* Grande
* GrassNinja
* Griffin
* Gullveig
* Gyogyi

== H ==
* Hatten (aka Lab Mouse)

* [[Hermod]]
* HaveN
* Hawk
* [[HocusPocus]]
* Ho|oCausT
* Hostile
* HuggleBunny
* Hurme

== I ==
* id815
* iDum
* Iliera
* Indignation
* Ipa
* IRC
* Isnaard

== J ==
* Jage
* JePPe
* Johnnyy
* Joonazz
* Joni
* [[Jukke]]

== K ==
* Kalma
* Kaptengu
* Karma
* Kemp
* Khab
* KJack.mp3
* Klong
* Knas
* kokbira
* [[Kominiarz]]
* Kop
* Kosar
* Kossu Man
* Krayonaise
* Krystal
* Kuchiki
* Kunoichi
* Kurt

== L ==
* Laku
* [[Legend]]
* LemonNinja
* Lemuu
* Lion}{eart
* [[Lodur]]
* Loke
* Loop
* Lucifer
* Luffy

== M ==
* Magma
* Magni
* manu
* Mashkito
* [[MasterOfHyrule]]
* Mates
* Maxxa
* Mc Hammer
* mfmr
* MiDenSioN
* Midnight
* MiLeC
* Moose
* Morby
* Mr.Hard
* _Michiel.

== N ==
* Nack
* Namura
* Napkin
* Nassie
* Navi
* Nets
* NightShade
* Nina
* Niubay
* Nox

== O ==
* Odin
* Oki
* O"Neill
* ooworm
* Origin
* oSq
* [[User Oxygen|Oxygen]]

== P ==
* p00
* Papuu
* Pelimies
* Pelle
* pelya
* Pera
* Perkele
* Piippu
* [[Pixy]]
* PlastE
* PooNinja
* PulVer
* Punisher
* [[Pupsi]]
* [[Purplehaze]]
* PyroManiac

== Q ==
* QuafaS
* Quaqa
* Quint G
* QuiverZ

== R ==
* Rafman
* Rambake
* Raziel
* ReClip
* redeye
* RIPA
* Rock
* Rommel
* Roodie
* Roxy
* [[User Ruki|Ruki]]
* [[User RuNyoufool|RuNyoufool]]
* RussG

== S ==
* Sakmongkol
* Scorpa
* Screams
* Seize
* [[User Shade|Shade]]
* Shank
* Sign$
* [[SkelZ]]
* SLako
* [[Snap]]
* SnowNinja
* [[SorZ]]
* Spade-AU
* [[User Spectro|Spectro]]
* Spoon
* [[SteelSide]]
* [[Strider]]
* Supra
* Sushi
* Svipdag
* Swift
* [[User Syphon|Syphon]] (aka miri)

== T ==
* [[User Tafka|Tafka]]
* T-Bag
* TeddyKGB
* Temeeh
* The Ripper
* Thomas
* Thor
* Thurdie
* tmYnnie
* Tony M.
* Turma
* Twister
* Tyrael
* Tytus

== U ==
* Umistand
* Uranda

== V ==
* V0dka
* Vainamoinen
* [[User Vidar|Vidar]]
* Vux

== W ==
* Wander
* Weird Apples
* weirdo
* Wooper
* Worminator

== X ==
* Xandoz
* Xargo
* Xis

== Y ==
* [[Yellowbart]]
* Ypsilon

== Z ==
* Z01
* Zai
* Zapp
* Zixxy

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721115530/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/Players -->
